headline: Assessing Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation As Recent Returns Contrast With Conflicting Fair Value Estimates
summary: How Duke Energy Stock Has Been Performing Duke Energy (DUK) has drawn fresh attention after recent price moves, with shares last closing at $131.82. For context, the stock shows a 0.3% one day return and 0.7% return over the past week. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. While the recent 0.7% 7 day share price return looks modest, Duke Energy’s 12.2% year to date share price return and 17.7% 1 year total shareholder return suggest momentum has been building over a longer stretch. headline: Duke Energy (DUK) Target Raised as Utilities Outlook Improves
